title: Phase 1: Int6 quant + zstd + sliding window eval + 10L 3xMLP
author: Cwarren15-A
body:
## Summary
- Int6 per-row quantization ([-31,31] range in int8 storage) + zstd-22 compression
- 10-layer model with 3x MLP width (enabled by ~25% artifact byte savings)
- Sliding window evaluation at stride-64 for better per-token context
- Muon weight decay (0.04) and momentum tuning (0.99)

## Files
- experiments/phase1/train_phase1.py — monkey-patches baseline with all features
- experiments/phase1/run_smoke.sh — smoke test (~2-3 min on 4xGPU)
- experiments/phase1/run_full.sh — full 10-minute submission run

## Test plan
- [ ] Smoke test completes end-to-end with final_int8_zlib_roundtrip line emitted
- [ ] Artifact size under 16MB
- [ ] BPB improvement over 1.2244 baseline
